features: QUALITY & STYLE: Opulize reading glasses offer incredible value whilst at the same time focusing on contemporary design. These classic lightweight large rectangular matt frames have been developed with comfort in mind. Available in 5 new vibrant colours
A PAIR FOR EVERYWHERE: Are you always losing your glasses or are they never in the right place at the right time? Now with Opulize's incredible value frames, you can have a pair in every room
COMFORT FIT: These easy to wear lightweight frames twinned with spring hinges make Opulize MAX the perfect choice of readers. This universal shape provides a perfect fit for most faces
COLOUR: Matt black with grey arms, matt navy blue with maroon arms
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Previous page Next page Previous page Next page How do I know which strength of reading glasses I need? Most start with +1.00 to +1.50 for mild blur up close. If you need to hold text further away, try a higher strength. For the best accuracy, we recommend an eye test. Are Opulize reading glasses suitable for all-day wear? Yes. Our lightweight, durable frames and clear lenses are designed for comfort. With flexible spring hinges, Opulize readers are ideal for daily use at work, home, or on the go. Why should I buy multiple pairs? Many customers keep pairs in the car, at home, and at work. With Opulize’s affordable range, it’s easy to stay prepared wherever you are. What makes Opulize a trusted choice? We’re a family-run business dedicated to combining premium quality, all-day comfort, and thoughtful design. Every pair is made to help you see clearly and feel confident.
